compact_output_surface_s4096.read: The compact partial-row output allocation/write surface lowers in TileLang and is not the wall by itself.

static_slot_scalar_smoke.read: A real TileLang compact-row dKV math kernel can compile and match a PyTorch oracle on a constrained slot-aligned route.

static_slot_scalar_medium.read: The scalar compact-row math path is a correctness/lowering proof only; it is far too slow to promote.

dynamic_pair_slot_scalar.failure: TileLang LayoutInference failed with 'no available layout found' before codegen.
dynamic_pair_slot_scalar.read: Dynamic PairSlots[token, selected] routed updates into compact partial rows are the current TileLang lowering blocker even without MFMA or local shared tables.

dynamic_local_table_scalar.failure: TileLang LayoutInference failed with 'no available layout found' when group_acc[slot, d] was a dynamic shared-memory update.
dynamic_local_table_scalar.read: The desired local active-group table is not yet lowering in TileLang with dynamic slot indexing.

mfma_reduced.failure: K16/D16 hit a TileLang MFMA layout divide-by-zero; K32/D32 and K32/D64 failed with 'no available layout found'.
mfma_reduced.read: The intended TileLang GEMM contribution body still needs a schedule/layout rewrite before it can be combined with compact routing.

decision.next_action: Use the working compact output/static-slot math surface as a bring-up harness, but the next production-relevant kernel must solve dynamic routed slot lowering plus MFMA contribution layout. If TileLang cannot lower dynamic compact slots, move the compact producer to HIP/CK/rocWMMA while keeping TileLang only for reference and schedule experiments.
decision.why: The compact write surface is cheap and the constrained math kernel works, but scalar math is already 65 ms at S128/topk128 and the production dynamic routed/MFMA form does not compile yet.
